text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap shows up at my office one evening
after skipping training.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. I really messed up.
choice_data_list: Can you tell me what happened?
Can you tell me what happened?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...I just really, reeeally couldn't miss it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Not the limited-time only Super Deluxe★Chop
Suey XXXL!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
The Chinese restaurant in the shopping district
has this famous chop suey, but it's only available
at certain times...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm really, really sorry... I promise I'll make up for
it in the next practi—

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Sigh... If only I had known it also causes super deluxe indigestion...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Since Oguri Cap already seems to be regretting
her decision, I tell her we may as well give her
stomach a rest.
